summary: Full backend + frontend validation for the two new features: (1) skeleton-on-/result while API loads, (2) multi-medicine chip search with per-medicine breakdown + interactions + combined safety. 9/9 backend tests passing (after 1 transient Gemini 503 retry). All 13 requested UI flows pass on mobile 390x844 via preview URL.

minor.issue: Occasional upstream Gemini 503/502 surfaces as 502 from backend (observed once during first run). Test passed on immediate retry. Consider lightweight retry-with-backoff (1-2 retries) around Gemini calls to smooth over transient overload. Not a blocker.

action_items: Optional: add retry-with-backoff around Gemini calls in server.py to absorb transient 503/502 bursts (/api/medical-query, /api/identify-medicine, /api/multi-medicine-query).
Optional nit already flagged in iteration_3: clear the voice typewriter setInterval in a useEffect cleanup in app/index.tsx if user navigates away mid-typing.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py _call_gemini logic is duplicated inline inside multi_medicine_query (uses its own httpx block with MULTI_SYSTEM_PROMPT). Consider refactoring _call_gemini to accept an override system_instruction to DRY up ~25 lines.
MultiMedicineResponse coercion is strict and safe (filters non-dict entries, defaults lists, language fallback). Good.
MAX_MEDICINES=3 enforced in both FE (addChip Alert) and BE (400). Consistent.
HomeScreen onAsk correctly merges trailing text into chips (up to MAX) before multi-query - matches the spec exactly.
Skeleton→content swap is driven by isLoadingResponse in zustand; setLastResponse/setLastMultiResponse both flip the flag off - clean.
seed_data_creation: None. Tests do not write to DB beyond what the API itself persists (history collection).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-medicine flow verified. testIDs: text-input, ask-button, add-medicine-button, chip-0..chip-2, chip-remove-0..chip-remove-2, chips-section, skeleton-result-card, multi-result-card, medicine-entry-0..medicine-entry-2, result-card, back-button, language-toggle, app-title. add-medicine-button is hidden when text is empty OR chips>=3 (not an alert - the button just disappears). chip-remove-N re-indexes chips after removal (removing chip-0 makes the former chip-1 become chip-0). ASK with chips + trailing text merges the trailing text as the last medicine up to MAX_MEDICINES=3. Preview URL https://medicine-scanner-3.preview.emergentagent.com serves /api routes (backend) and /, /result (frontend web preview via Expo tunnel). Gemini occasionally returns 503/502 under load - retry once before failing test.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no bugs found. One transient Gemini 503 (upstream overload) caused a single backend test failure on first run; passed on immediate retry with same payload. Not reproducible on subsequent runs.
